markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[GrowthX pitches its AI content service to Factory for SEO growth.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Factory's Goal:** Rapidly build SEO/AEO authority for its AI agent harness, which targets all engineers (frontend, backend, infra) and has both enterprise (CTOs, VPEs) and self-service GTM motions.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Pitch:** An end-to-end service delivering 5 articles/week to build deep topical authority, using a human-in-the-loop AI platform to ensure quality and scale.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**Key Friction Point:** Factory wants to publish content immediately, but GrowthX's process includes an 8-week, $18k "Strategy Sprint" for calibration before full-scale execution.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Tyler will send Augment Code case studies and content examples for Factory to review internally before scheduling a full demo with key decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

## Topics

### Factory's SEO Challenge & Goals

  - [**Need:** Build SEO/AEO authority from a near-zero baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Current State:**](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Limited SEO work (metadata, SEMrush reports).](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [No backlinking strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [Content created in-house by Caroline (Head of Strategy) and Francesca (VP of Ops).](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Competitors to Target:**](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Cognition (Devon)](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Cursor](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Sourcegraph](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Cloud Code (Anthropic)](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Codex (OpenAI)](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Winsurf](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Service:** End-to-end content partnership for AI search (AEO) and traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Develop a 6-month content roadmap based on keyword analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
      - [**Execution:** Deliver 5 articles/week to build deep topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Monitoring:** Track LLM citations and content performance to pivot strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**Methodology:** A human-in-the-loop AI platform, guided by a team with experience from TechCrunch and G2.com.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [**Case Study (Augment Code):**](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
      - [**Results:** 3x organic traffic in 6 months (20k → 60k/mo), allowing them to pause all paid spend.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Published \~300 guides in a separate `/guides` section to build authority without diluting the main blog's thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [**Impact:** Content is cited in AI answers and ranks highly in traditional search, helping to frame the market around Augment's strengths (e.g., large context window).](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

### Partnership Model & Timeline

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint ($18k, 8 weeks)**](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Calibrate on brand voice, personas, and product details.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [**Process:** Kickoff, product deep dive, artifact review, and calibration articles.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [**Outcome:** A content roadmap and, for some clients, 20+ live articles.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
      - [**Opt-Out:** Factory can exit after the sprint if not confident in the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution (Ongoing)**](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [**Cadence:** 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Workflow:** GrowthX handles writing, staging, and publishing; Factory provides draft feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [**Factory's Concern:** The 8-week sprint is too long; Factory wants to publish content immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Response:** The timeline can be expedited with quick feedback. A formal POC is not offered, but the sprint's opt-out clause serves as a trial.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send Factory the following:](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
      - [Augment Code case study and content examples.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
      - [GrowthX pitch deck and Marcel's recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
      - [Additional client success stories.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [**Factory (Kristina, Caroline):** Review materials internally with Christina and Francesca.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [**Factory:** Schedule a full demo with key decision-makers after the internal review.](https://fathom.video/share/GJeZTfoLbXkMpcFdcwpkLNwAg1FaEPdv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
